Headline: Loop-bound Purple Line Delays
ShortDescription: Loop-bound Purple Line trains are running with residual delays following earlier signal problems near Belmont. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop-bound Purple Line trains are running with residual delays following earlier signal problems near Belmont.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #57 Laramie Temporary Reroute at Laramie/Grand
ShortDescription: 57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Laramie/Grand.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Laramie, North Avenue, Cicero, and Grand into the terminal, due to street blockage near Laramie/Grand.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #111 111th/King Drive Temporary Reroute near 115th/Watkins
ShortDescription: 111 111th/King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 115th/Watkins.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#111 111th/King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 115th/Watkins.

Southbound buses will operate via 111th, Monterey, Marshfield, 115th and over regular route.

Northbound buses will operate via Marshfield, 119th, Ashland, 112th Place, Vincennes and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Trains rerouted downtown: Stations along Lake and Wabash closed
ShortDescription: Orange, Green, Pink and Brown Line trains will be rerouted downtown for work on building a new State/Lake station.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orange, Green, Pink and Brown Line trains will be rerouted downtown for work on building a new State/Lake station.

Orange and Brown Lines: Trains will operate as one route between Kimball and Midway, via the Wells and Van Buren sides of the Loop, downtown.

Green Line: Trains will operate between Harlem/Lake and 63rd street terminals, but via Wells and Van Buren.

Pink Line: Trains will operate between 54th/Cermak and Clinton, only. For continuing service, transfer at Clinton to a Green Line train toward 63rd.

Loop 'L' and subways: To transfer between the Loop elevated and the subways, transfer at H.W. Library (Loop elevated lines) and Jackson (Blue or Red lines via subway).
